description_long: This chaise features a modern, sculptural form with a continuous, undulating seat and backrest that flows in a single, smooth curve. The exterior is clad in segmented wooden slats, arranged diagonally on the sides and horizontally along the top, creating a visually dynamic pattern. The seat is ergonomically contoured, rising at one end to form a high backrest and dipping in the middle for comfortable lounging. The base appears to be a solid, rectangular block, likely providing stability and weight. The color palette is natural, with light brown wood on the exterior and a grayish base. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban parks or public relaxation areas.
description: A modern chaise with a flowing, wave-like wooden form and segmented slat detailing, featuring a high backrest and a solid rectangular base in natural wood tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wave-like profile, with the high backrest and contoured seat clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the flat, square end with diagonal wood slat pattern and no visible seat contour.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the wave-like profile, highlighting the ergonomic dip and rise of the seat and backrest.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the horizontal segmentation of the wood slats and the overall width of the chaise.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall and smoothly curved, rising from the seat in a continuous wave-like form. It is segmented with horizontal wooden slats, giving it a modern, minimalist appearance without any decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The chaise does not have visible legs; instead, it rests on a solid, rectangular base that extends the full length and width of the piece, providing stability.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The surface is not upholstered but features a segmented wood slat pattern, with the slats running horizontally along the top and diagonally on the sides, creating a geometric visual effect.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are no visible cushions; the seating surface is a continuous, contoured wooden structure without any attached or loose cushions.
